license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7uehnte
title: Glycerol Stock
author: Alba Balletbó

steps_raw.instruction: Take 700 µL of overnight culture and add it to a sterile Cryotube. Corning® 2 mL Internal Threaded Polypropylene Cryogenic Vial Self-Standing with Round Bottom Corning Catalog #430488
Add 300 µL of sterile 80 % volume, Glycerol solution and invert 2-3 times.
Place the glycerol stock in -80ºC until needed again.
Grow desired culture overnight in 5 mL to 10 mL, Luria-Bertani (LB) media. Note: Other desired media can also be used, such as M9 minimal media, Terrific broth (TB), etc.
